batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of samples per gradient update.

steps_per_epoch.title: Batches per epoch (optional)
steps_per_epoch.description: Number of batches to train per epoch. Leave empty to use the whole dataset; set a smaller value to make epochs shorter on large datasets.

continue_training.title: Continue training from previous model
continue_training.description: Resume training from the last checkpoint.
